item.title: 🔴 Inspire – Stories That Spark Hope
item.dc:creator: auticure
item.content:encoded:
Every person on the autism spectrum has a story that can teach us something powerful. At Auticure, we believe that real-life experiences — the victories, the struggles, and the breakthroughs — are a source of light for those on similar journeys. Our Inspire page is dedicated to sharing the voices of parents, children, educators, and caregivers whose stories speak louder than any textbook.

You’ll read about children who spoke their first words after years of silence, teens who found confidence through art, and families who turned challenges into strength. These stories show that growth is not always linear, but every small step matters. For parents feeling overwhelmed, these testimonials offer comfort and the assurance that progress is always possible.

We also highlight educators and therapists who go beyond the call of duty to make classrooms more inclusive and therapeutic spaces more responsive. These professionals remind us that inspiration isn’t just emotional — it’s a call to action. Each story is a window into possibility, revealing the resilience and creativity that exists within the autism community.

We invite you to read, reflect, and even share your own experience. Your story might be the one that gives someone else the courage to keep going. At Auticure, we believe that by inspiring each other, we create a ripple effect of understanding, hope, and positive change. Together, we can celebrate every voice on the spectrum — because every voice matters.
item.excerpt:encoded: We strive to improve the lives of our students through education of Academic, Behavioral, Cognitive, and Social Skills.

item.title: 🟡 Engage – Build Real Connections
item.dc:creator: auticure
item.content:encoded:
Connection is one of the most powerful forms of therapy. For individuals on the autism spectrum, consistent engagement helps build communication skills, reduce anxiety, and foster emotional growth. At Auticure, we emphasize the value of structured, purposeful interaction that meets each person where they are.

Engaging with someone on the spectrum doesn’t require fancy tools or special skills — it requires patience, creativity, and understanding. Whether it’s playing a sensory-based game, responding to nonverbal cues, or practicing routines through visual aids, these interactions help bridge gaps in communication and build lasting bonds. Our platform provides tools and activity ideas that are fun, effective, and adaptable to different age groups and abilities.

We offer printable activity cards, communication boards, story-based games, and interactive digital tools that support both verbal and nonverbal individuals. Families can discover everyday engagement strategies, while teachers can explore classroom-friendly resources designed to promote inclusion. These tools aren't just about development — they're about making autistic individuals feel seen, heard, and respected.

True engagement transforms lives. When families, therapists, educators, and peers work together to engage with intention, growth follows naturally. Whether you're helping a child express themselves for the first time or supporting a teen in navigating social spaces, your presence matters. At Auticure, we’re here to help you make that connection stronger every day.
item.excerpt:encoded: It is important to have teachers & therapists engaging students to learn and parents involved in both student programs and school activities

item.title: 🔵 Educate – Empower Through Knowledge
item.dc:creator: auticure
item.content:encoded:
Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) is a neurological condition that influences how a person communicates, interacts, and processes the world around them. But it is not a disease — it’s a different way of being. At Auticure, we believe that the key to acceptance begins with education. Understanding autism allows us to replace fear and confusion with empathy and support.

Through this page, we provide accessible, evidence-based knowledge about autism, its early signs, and developmental characteristics. Whether you're a parent, caregiver, teacher, or simply someone wanting to learn, our content is structured to guide you with clarity. You’ll find simplified explanations of common behaviors, sensory sensitivities, and speech or learning delays — all tailored to real-life scenarios.

Informed awareness leads to earlier diagnosis and timely intervention. That’s why we focus on the importance of early identification and support. You'll also find curated resources including checklists, expert video talks, downloadable guides, and common questions answered by professionals. Our goal is to give you the tools and confidence to support autistic individuals in your care.

Ultimately, education is a lifelong journey — not just for those diagnosed with autism, but for everyone around them. When we take the time to learn, we break down barriers, build trust, and create inclusive communities. At Auticure, we believe knowledge is the most powerful way to begin creating a more compassionate world.
item.excerpt:encoded: We strive to improve the lives of our students through education of Academic, Behavioral, Cognitive, and Social Skills.

item.title: Eva Green, Founder Auticure
item.dc:creator: auticure
item.content:encoded: Auticure was born out of a simple belief — that every child deserves to be understood and supported. In a country where autism is often misunderstood, our goal is to provide families with compassionate care, early intervention, and hope. We’re here to walk this journey with you, helping every child shine in their own unique way.

We are a non-profit organization. Our goal is to provide every individual with special needs the support, friendship and inclusion that they deserve.
 

With this inspiration, the lives of the families we serve are enhanced while the volunteers reap the rewards of selfless giving. We create friendship in the lives of individuals with special needs and provides an opportunity to become a contributing member of the community.

item.title: About
item.dc:creator: auticure
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row][vc_column css=".vc_custom_1752071268270{margin-left: 0px !important;}"][vc_empty_space alter_height="huge" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502884886325{margin-top: 1.25rem !important;}"][vc_column_text css=".vc_custom_1752073557881{border-right-width: 0px !important;border-left-width: 0px !important;}"]

Welcome To Auticure

To empower children with autism
through compassionate therapy, inclusive education, and strong family support.
so they can thrive in their own beautiful way

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space alter_height="huge" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502884886325{margin-top: 1.25rem !important;}"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content_no_spaces" equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle"][vc_column width="1/2" css=".vc_custom_1502884755751{background-color: #f7f7f7 !important;}" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-0"][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner width="1/6"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner width="2/3"][vc_empty_space alter_height="huge" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502884886325{margin-top: 1.25rem !important;}"][vc_single_image image="293" img_size="full" alignment="center" css=""][vc_empty_space alter_height="small" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502885433741{margin-top: -0.5rem !important;}"][trx_sc_testimonials type="simple" orderby="none" slider="" title_style="default" columns="1" ids="535"][vc_empty_space alter_height="large" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502886206172{margin-top: 2.2rem !important;}"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/3" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-1"][trx_sc_title title_style="default" title_tag="h4" title_align="center" title="Say Grow Your Child!" css=".vc_custom_1752073500917{margin-right: 0px !important;margin-left: 0px !important;padding-right: 150px !important;padding-left: 150px !important;}"][vc_empty_space alter_height="medium" hide_on_mobile=""][trx_sc_title title_style="default" title_tag="h4" title_align="center" subtitle="Make a difference in the life of a child with special needs." css=".vc_custom_1752074403772{margin-right: 100px !important;margin-left: 100px !important;}"][vc_empty_space alter_height="medium" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502885030416{margin-top: -0.7rem !important;}"][vc_column_text css=".vc_custom_1752074432847{padding-right: 100px !important;padding-left: 100px !important;}"]

At Auticure, we believe that every child with autism deserves understanding, support, and opportunity. We provide early diagnosis, therapy, and family guidance — all with compassion and care. Our goal is to make autism support accessible and inclusive for families across Pakistan, so no child is left behind.

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space alter_height="medium" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502885061552{margin-top: -0.3rem !important;}"][trx_sc_button type="default" new_window="" align="center" icon_position="left" hide_on_tablet="" hide_on_mobile="" link="https://auticure.techeezy.com/scholarships/" title="More About Us"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row" css=".vc_custom_1502889425141{background-image: url(https://auticure.techeezy.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/06/timeline_bg.jpg?id=556) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}"][vc_column][vc_empty_space alter_height="huge" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502888837501{margin-top: 0.8rem !important;}"][trx_sc_title title_style="default" title_tag="h4" title_align="center" scheme="dark" title="About Us" subtitle="Auticure is a support platform dedicated to helping children with autism and developmental challenges in Pakistan. We offer early diagnosis, therapy, parental education, and awareness — making autism care more accessible, compassionate, and inclusive. At Auticure, every child is seen, heard, and supported." css=".vc_custom_1752074040105{margin-right: 150px !important;margin-left: 150px !important;}"][vc_empty_space alter_height="medium" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502888865366{margin-top: 0.7rem !important;}"][/vc_column][vc_column width="5/6" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-1 vc_hidden-xs"][vc_single_image image="551" img_size="full" alignment="center"][/vc_column][vc_column][vc_row_inner disable_element="yes"][vc_column_inner width="1/4"][vc_column_text]

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: auticure
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row full_width="stretch_row" equal_height="yes"][vc_column][vc_column_text css=""][metaslider id="1895"][/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content_no_spaces" equal_height="yes"][vc_column width="1/3" icons_position="left" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-1"][vc_empty_space alter_height="huge" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502965317412{margin-top: 0.9rem !important;}"][trx_sc_title title_style="default" title_tag="h4" title_align="center" title="Welcome to Auticure"][vc_empty_space alter_height="medium" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502965442313{margin-top: -0.1rem !important;}"][trx_sc_title title_style="default" title_tag="h4" title_align="center" subtitle="A dedicated platform supporting children with autism and their families across Pakistan. We provide trusted therapies, resources, and a supportive community to help your child grow and thrive." css=".vc_custom_1752054793170{padding-right: 2rem !important;padding-left: 2rem !important;}"][vc_empty_space alter_height="medium" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502965506587{margin-top: -0.8rem !important;}"][vc_column_text css=".vc_custom_1502965493373{padding-right: 3rem !important;padding-left: 3rem !important;}"]

Types of special needs vary in severity. People with autism, Down syndrome, dyslexia, blindness, ADHD, or cystic fibrosis, for example, may be considered to have special needs. However, special needs can also include cleft lips, or missing limbs.

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space alter_height="medium" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502965581566{margin-top: -0.25rem !important;}"][trx_sc_button type="default" color_style="dark" new_window="" align="center" icon_position="left" hide_on_tablet="" hide_on_mobile="" link="https://auticure.techeezy.com/our-staff/" title="more about us"][vc_empty_space alter_height="large" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1752057032516{margin-top: 2.55rem !important;}"][vc_single_image image="361" img_size="full" alignment="center" css=".vc_custom_1502969764359{margin-bottom: -1rem !important;}"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2" icons_position="left" css=".vc_custom_1502965151048{background-color: #f7f7f7 !important;}" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-1"][vc_empty_space alter_height="medium" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1752056806435{background-color: #FFFFFF !important;}"][vc_column_text css=".vc_custom_1752056208660{padding-top: 30px !important;padding-right: 30px !important;padding-bottom: 30px !important;padding-left: 30px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}"]

What is Autism?

Autism is a neurological difference that affects communication, learning, and behavior. Every child with autism is unique — with the right care and therapy, their potential is limitless.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css=".vc_custom_1752056110207{padding-top: 30px !important;padding-right: 30px !important;padding-bottom: 30px !important;padding-left: 30px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}"]

What is Down-Syndrome?

A genetic disorder caused by an extra chromosome (usually 21).

  • Features: Delayed learning, unique facial appearance, lower muscle tone.

  • Support Needed: Special education, speech therapy, health monitoring.

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css=".vc_custom_1752056490487{padding-top: 30px !important;padding-right: 30px !important;padding-bottom: 30px !important;padding-left: 30px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}"]

What is Dyslexia?

A learning disability that affects reading and writing.

  • Features: Difficulty reading words, confusing letters (like b and d), spelling trouble.

  • Support Needed: Special reading programs, extra time in school tests.

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css=".vc_custom_1752056762656{padding-top: 30px !important;padding-right: 30px !important;padding-bottom: 30px !important;padding-left: 30px !important;background-color: #ffffff !important;}"]

What is Cystic Fibrosis?

A genetic disease that causes thick mucus to build up in the lungs and digestive system.

  • Features: Breathing problems, lung infections, poor weight gain.

  • Support Needed: Daily chest therapy, special diet, frequent medical care.

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space alter_height="large" hide_on_mobile=""][trx_sc_testimonials type="simple" orderby="none" title_style="default" ids="630"][vc_empty_space alter_height="large" hide_on_mobile=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row" css=".vc_custom_1502971383754{background-image: url(https://auticure.techeezy.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/06/numbered_services_bg.jpg?id=479) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}"][vc_column icons_position="left"][vc_empty_space alter_height="huge" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502971627464{margin-top: 1rem !important;}"][trx_sc_title url(https://auticure.techeezy.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/06/Screenshot-2025-07-08-192424.png?id=1792) !important;background-position: center !important;background-repeat: no-repeat !important;background-size: cover !important;}"][vc_column icons_position="left"][vc_empty_space alter_height="medium" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502868389471{margin-top: -0.8rem !important;}"][vc_empty_space alter_height="huge" hide_on_mobile=""][vc_column_text]

Everyone can
make a difference[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space alter_height="medium" hide_on_mobile=""][vc_empty_space alter_height="medium" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502868867500{margin-top: 1.9rem !important;}"][vc_empty_space alter_height="huge" hide_on_mobile=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content_no_spaces" equal_height="yes"][vc_column width="1/3" icons_position="left" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-1"][vc_empty_space alter_height="huge" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502974138897{margin-top: 1rem !important;}"][trx_sc_title title_style="default" title_tag="h4" title_align="center" title="Mission"][vc_empty_space alter_height="medium" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502974369842{margin-top: -0.1rem !important;}"][trx_sc_title title_style="default" title_tag="h4" title_align="center" subtitle="To empower children with autism and other developmental challenges by providing compassionate care, specialized therapy, and inclusive education — helping every child live a confident, fulfilling life." css=".vc_custom_1752059300122{padding-right: 2rem !important;padding-left: 2rem !important;}"][vc_tta_tabs shape="round" spacing="" tab_position="bottom" alignment="center" active_section="1" no_fill_content_area="true"][vc_tta_section title="mission" tab_id="1498475487619-7bed29a2-3ad3"][vc_column_text css=""]

At Auticure, our mission is to empower children with autism and other developmental conditions by offering compassionate care, personalized therapy, and inclusive education. We strive to create a nurturing and respectful environment where every child can grow with confidence and unlock their full potential.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_tta_section][vc_tta_section title="goals" tab_id="1498475487664-906741ba-4d09"][vc_column_text css=""]

Our goal is to provide early diagnosis and effective intervention, making therapy accessible and affordable for families across Pakistan. We aim to support parents through education and counseling, raise public awareness to eliminate stigma, and build a nationwide network of trained professionals to ensure consistent and quality care for all.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_tta_section][vc_tta_section title="beliefs" tab_id="1498475519147-80e89ff1-97ad"][vc_column_text css=""]

At Auticure, we believe that every child is unique and full of potential. We trust in the strength of families and the power of early support. We value compassion, inclusion, and dignity — and we stand for a world where every child with autism is respected, supported, and given the opportunity to thrive.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_tta_section][/vc_tta_tabs][vc_empty_space alter_height="huge" hide_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1502977216899{margin-top: 2rem !important;}"][/vc_column][vc_column width="1/2" item.title: Privacy Policy
item.dc:creator: auticure
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row hide_bg_image_on_tablet="" hide_bg_image_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1527690588959{background-color: #f7f8f9 !important;}"][vc_column icons_position="left"][vc_empty_space height="40px" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][vc_empty_space height="30px" hide_on_mobile="1" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][trx_sc_content size="none" paddings="tiny" number_position="br" title_style="default" link_style="default" class="p70"][vc_column_text]
1. INTRODUCTION
AncoraThemes (website url address: https://ancorathemes.com/) appreciates your business and trust. We are Cyprus based company, creating products to enhance your website building experience. Please read this Privacy Policy, providing consent to both documents in order to have permission to use our services.[/vc_column_text][/trx_sc_content][vc_empty_space height="4em" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column icons_position="left"][vc_empty_space height="40px" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][vc_empty_space height="30px" hide_on_mobile="1" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row hide_bg_image_on_tablet="" hide_bg_image_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1527690597112{background-color: #f7f8f9 !important;}"][vc_column icons_position="left"][trx_sc_content size="none" paddings="tiny" number_position="br" title_style="default" link_style="default" class="p70"][vc_column_text]
2. DATA COLLECTED
DATA STORAGE LOCATION
We are Cyprus based company and operate web servers hosted in Germany. Our hosting provider Hetzner Online GmbH adheres to the EU/US “Privacy Shield”, ensuring that your data is securely stored and GDPR compliant. For more information on Hetzner Online GmbH privacy policy, please see here: Hetzner Data Privacy Policy.
REGISTRATION DATA
If you register on our website, we store your chosen username and your email address and any additional personal information added to your user profile. You can see, edit, or delete your personal information at any time (except changing your username). Website administrators can also see and edit this information.
PURCHASE DATA
To receive product support, you have to have one or more Envato/AncoraThemes purchase codes on our website. These purchase codes will be stored together with support expiration dates and your user data. This is required for us to provide you with downloads, product support and other customer services.
SUPPORT DATA
If you have registered on our website and have a valid support account, you can submit support tickets for assistance. Support form submissions are sent to our third party Ticksy ticketing system. Only the data you explicitly provided is sent, and you are asked for consent, each time you want to create a new support ticket. Ticksy adheres to the EU/US “Privacy Shield” and you can see their privacy policy here: Ticksy Privacy Policy.
COMMENTS
When you leave comments on the website we collect the data shown in the comments form, and also the IP address and browser user agent string to help spam detection.
CONTACT FORM
Information submitted through the contact form on our site is sent to our company email, hosted by Zoho. Zoho adheres to the EU/US “Privacy Shield” policy and you can find more information about this here: Zoho Privacy Policy. These submissions are only kept for customer service purposes they are never used for marketing purposes or shared with third parties.
GOOGLE ANALYTICS
We use Google Analytics on our site for anonymous reporting of site usage. So, no personalized data is stored. If you would like to opt-out of Google Analytics monitoring your behavior on our website please use this link: Google Analytics Opt-out.
CASES FOR USING THE PERSONAL DATA
We use your personal information in the following cases:
  • Verification/identification of the user during website usage;
  • Providing Technical Assistance;
  • Sending updates to our users with important information to inform about news/changes;
  • Checking the accounts’ activity in order to prevent fraudulent transactions and ensure the security
  • over our customers’ personal information;
  • Customize the website to make your experience more personal and engaging;
  • Guarantee overall performance and administrative functions run smoothly.
[/vc_column_text][/trx_sc_content][vc_empty_space height="4em" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column icons_position="left"][vc_empty_space height="40px" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][vc_empty_space height="30px" hide_on_mobile="1" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row hide_bg_image_on_tablet="" hide_bg_image_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1527690601612{background-color: #f7f8f9 !important;}"][vc_column icons_position="left"][trx_sc_content size="none" paddings="tiny" number_position="br" title_style="default" link_style="default" class="p70"][vc_column_text]
3. EMBEDDED CONTENT
Pages on this site may include embedded content, like YouTube videos, for example. Embedded content from other websites behaves in the exact same way as if you visited the other website. These websites may collect data about you, use cookies, embed additional third-party tracking, and monitor your interaction with that embedded content, including tracking your interaction with the embedded content if you have an account and are logged-in to that website. Below you can find a list of the services we use:
FACEBOOK
The Facebook page plugin is used to display our Facebook timeline on our site. Facebook has its own cookie and privacy policies over which we have no control. There is no installation of cookies from Facebook and your IP is not sent to a Facebook server until you consent to it. See their privacy policy here: Facebook Privacy Policy .
TWITTER
We use the Twitter API to display our tweets timeline on our site. Twitter has its own cookie and privacy policies over which we have no control. Your IP is not sent to a Twitter server until you consent to it. See their privacy policy here: Twitter Privacy Policy .
YOUTUBE
We use YouTube videos embedded on our site. YouTube has its own cookie and privacy policies over which we have no control. There is no installation of cookies from YouTube and your IP is not sent to a YouTube server until you consent to it. See their privacy policy here: YouTube Privacy Policy.[/vc_column_text][/trx_sc_content][vc_empty_space height="4em" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column icons_position="left"][vc_empty_space height="40px" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][vc_empty_space height="30px" hide_on_mobile="1" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row hide_bg_image_on_tablet="" hide_bg_image_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1527690606563{background-color: #f7f8f9 !important;}"][vc_column icons_position="left"][trx_sc_content size="none" paddings="tiny" number_position="br" title_style="default" link_style="default" class="p70"][vc_column_text]
4. COOKIES
This site uses cookies – small text files that are placed on your machine to help the site provide a better user experience. In general, cookies are used to retain user preferences, store information for things like shopping carts, and provide anonymized tracking data to third party applications like Google Analytics. Cookies generally exist to make your browsing experience better. However, you may prefer to disable cookies on this site and on others. The most effective way to do this is to disable cookies in your browser. We suggest consulting the help section of your browser.
NECESSARY COOKIES (ALL SITE VISITORS)
  • cfduid: Is used for our CDN CloudFlare to identify individual clients behind a shared IP address and apply security settings on a per-client basis. See more information on privacy here: CloudFlare Privacy Policy.
  • PHPSESSID: To identify your unique session on the website.
NECESSARY COOKIES (ADDITIONAL FOR LOGGED IN CUSTOMERS)
  • wp-auth: Used by WordPress to authenticate logged-in visitors, password authentication and user verification.
  • wordpress_logged_in_{hash}: Used by WordPress to authenticate logged-in visitors, password authentication and user verification.
  • wordpress_test_cookie Used by WordPress to ensure cookies are working correctly.
  • wp-settings-[UID]: WordPress sets a few wp-settings-[UID] cookies. The number on the end is your individual user ID from the users database table. This is used to customize your view of admin interface, and possibly also the main site interface.
  • wp-settings-[UID]:WordPress also sets a few wp-settings-{time}-[UID] cookies. The number on the end is your individual user ID from the users database table. This is used to customize your view of admin interface, and possibly also the main site interface.
[/vc_column_text][/trx_sc_content][vc_empty_space height="4em" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column icons_position="left"][vc_empty_space height="40px" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][vc_empty_space height="30px" hide_on_mobile="1" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row hide_bg_image_on_tablet="" hide_bg_image_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1527690611459{background-color: #f7f8f9 !important;}"][vc_column icons_position="left"][trx_sc_content size="none" paddings="tiny" number_position="br" title_style="default" link_style="default" class="p70"][vc_column_text]
5. WHO HAS ACCESS TO YOUR DATA
If you are not a registered client for our site, there is no personal information we can retain or view regarding yourself. If you are a client with a registered account, your personal information can be accessed by:
  • Our system administrators.
  • Our supporters when they (in order to provide support) need to get the information about the client accounts and access.
[/vc_column_text][/trx_sc_content][vc_empty_space height="4em" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column icons_position="left"][vc_empty_space height="40px" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][vc_empty_space height="30px" hide_on_mobile="1" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row hide_bg_image_on_tablet="" hide_bg_image_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1527690611459{background-color: #f7f8f9 !important;}"][vc_column icons_position="left"][trx_sc_content size="none" paddings="tiny" number_position="br" title_style="default" link_style="default" class="p70"][vc_column_text]
6. THIRD PARTY ACCESS TO YOUR DATA
We don’t share your data with third-parties in a way as to reveal any of your personal information like email, name, etc. The only exceptions to that rule are for partners we have to share limited data with in order to provide the services you expect from us. Please see below:
ENVATO PTY LTD
For the purpose of validating and getting your purchase information regarding licenses for our theme, we send your provided tokens and purchase keys to Envato Pty Ltd and use the response from their API to register your validated support data. See the Envato privacy policy here: Envato Privacy Policy.
TICKSY
Ticksy provides the support ticketing platform we use to handle support requests. The data they receive is limited to the data you explicitly provide and consent to being set when you create a support ticket. Ticksy adheres to the EU/US “Privacy Shield” and you can see their privacy policy here: Ticksy Privacy Policy.[/vc_column_text][/trx_sc_content][vc_empty_space height="4em" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column icons_position="left"][vc_empty_space height="40px" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][vc_empty_space height="30px" hide_on_mobile="1" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row hide_bg_image_on_tablet="" hide_bg_image_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1527690611459{background-color: #f7f8f9 !important;}"][vc_column icons_position="left"][trx_sc_content size="none" paddings="tiny" number_position="br" title_style="default" link_style="default" class="p70"][vc_column_text]
7. HOW LONG WE RETAIN YOUR DATA
When you submit a support ticket or a comment, its metadata is retained until (if) you tell us to remove it. We use this data so that we can recognize you and approve your comments automatically instead of holding them for moderation. If you register on our website, we also store the personal information you provide in your user profile. You can see, edit, or delete your personal information at any time (except changing your username). Website administrators can also see and edit that information.[/vc_column_text][/trx_sc_content][vc_empty_space height="4em" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column icons_position="left"][vc_empty_space height="40px" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][vc_empty_space height="30px" hide_on_mobile="1" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row hide_bg_image_on_tablet="" hide_bg_image_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1527690611459{background-color: #f7f8f9 !important;}"][vc_column icons_position="left"][trx_sc_content size="none" paddings="tiny" number_position="br" title_style="default" link_style="default" class="p70"][vc_column_text]
8. SECURITY MEASURES
We use the SSL/HTTPS protocol throughout our site. This encrypts our user communications with the servers so that personal identifiable information is not captured/hijacked by third parties without authorization. In case of a data breach, system administrators will immediately take all needed steps to ensure system integrity, will contact affected users and will attempt to reset passwords if needed.[/vc_column_text][/trx_sc_content][vc_empty_space height="4em" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column icons_position="left"][vc_empty_space height="40px" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][vc_empty_space height="30px" hide_on_mobile="1" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row hide_bg_image_on_tablet="" hide_bg_image_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1527690611459{background-color: #f7f8f9 !important;}"][vc_column icons_position="left"][trx_sc_content size="none" paddings="tiny" number_position="br" title_style="default" link_style="default" class="p70"][vc_column_text]
9. YOUR DATA RIGHTS
GENERAL RIGHTS
If you have a registered account on this website or have left comments, you can request an exported file of the personal data we retain, including any additional data you have provided to us. You can also request that we erase any of the personal data we have stored. This does not include any data we are obliged to keep for administrative, legal, or security purposes. In short, we cannot erase data that is vital to you being an active customer (i.e. basic account information like an email address). If you wish that all of your data is erased, we will no longer be able to offer any support or other product-related services to you.
GDPR RIGHTS
Your privacy is critically important to us. Going forward with the GDPR we aim to support the GDPR standard. AncoraThemes permits residents of the European Union to use its Service. Therefore, it is the intent of AncoraThemes to comply with the European General Data Protection Regulation. For more details please see here: EU GDPR Information Portal.[/vc_column_text][/trx_sc_content][vc_empty_space height="4em" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column icons_position="left"][vc_empty_space height="40px" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][vc_empty_space height="30px" hide_on_mobile="1" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row hide_bg_image_on_tablet="" hide_bg_image_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1527690611459{background-color: #f7f8f9 !important;}"][vc_column icons_position="left"][trx_sc_content size="none" paddings="tiny" number_position="br" title_style="default" link_style="default" class="p70"][vc_column_text]
10. THIRD PARTY WEBSITES
AncoraThemes may post links to third party websites on this website. These third party websites are not screened for privacy or security compliance by AncoraThemes, and you release us from any liability for the conduct of these third party websites. All social media sharing links, either displayed as text links or social media icons do not connect you to any of the associated third parties, unless you explicitly click on them. Please be aware that this Privacy Policy, and any other policies in place, in addition to any amendments, does not create rights enforceable by third parties or require disclosure of any personal information relating to members of the Service or Site. AncoraThemes bears no responsibility for the information collected or used by any advertiser or third party website. Please review the privacy policy and terms of service for each site you visit through third party links.[/vc_column_text][/trx_sc_content][vc_empty_space height="4em" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column icons_position="left"][vc_empty_space height="40px" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][vc_empty_space height="30px" hide_on_mobile="1" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row hide_bg_image_on_tablet="" hide_bg_image_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1527690611459{background-color: #f7f8f9 !important;}"][vc_column icons_position="left"][trx_sc_content size="none" paddings="tiny" number_position="br" title_style="default" link_style="default" class="p70"][vc_column_text]
11. RELEASE OF YOUR DATA FOR LEGAL PURPOSES
At times it may become necessary or desirable to AncoraThemes, for legal purposes, to release your information in response to a request from a government agency or a private litigant. You agree that we may disclose your information to a third party where we believe, in good faith, that it is desirable to do so for the purposes of a civil action, criminal investigation, or other legal matter. In the event that we receive a subpoena affecting your privacy, we may elect to notify you to give you an opportunity to file a motion to quash the subpoena, or we may attempt to quash it ourselves, but we are not obligated to do either. We may also proactively report you, and release your information to, third parties where we believe that it is prudent to do so for legal reasons, such as our belief that you have engaged in fraudulent activities. You release us from any damages that may arise from or relate to the release of your information to a request from law enforcement agencies or private litigants. Any passing on of personal data for legal purposes will only be done in compliance with laws of the country you reside in.[/vc_column_text][/trx_sc_content][vc_empty_space height="4em" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column icons_position="left"][vc_empty_space height="40px" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][vc_empty_space height="30px" hide_on_mobile="1" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row hide_bg_image_on_tablet="" hide_bg_image_on_mobile="" css=".vc_custom_1527690611459{background-color: #f7f8f9 !important;}"][vc_column icons_position="left"][trx_sc_content size="none" paddings="tiny" number_position="br" title_style="default" link_style="default" class="p70"][vc_column_text]
12. AMENDMENTS
We may amend this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we amend this Privacy Policy, we will update this page accordingly and require you to accept the amendments in order to be permitted to continue using our services.[/vc_column_text][/trx_sc_content][vc_empty_space height="4em" hide_on_mobile="" hide_on_desktop="" hide_on_notebook="" hide_on_tablet=""][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: Service Plus
item.dc:creator: auticure
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]

Dear Customers,

Our primary goal is developing a secure and customizable theme framework that meets the needs of the end user. Therefore, our customers are able to create websites using our templates as easy as 1-2-3! This process requires minimum knowledge of WordPress and coding, and extended documentation and our Support Team is always at your service. However, we ask you to keep in mind that sometimes issues occur not because of templates malfunction. There might be situations when it doesn't depend on us and the framework. For example, server settings, some extra functional that requires deep file customization, or additional plugins usage. And of course, an attempt to build a website in a very short time. We know our theme framework perfectly and have a highly-professional team of developers. They will help you to develop the website you need. If you need website customization, contact our support system for further information.[/vc_column_text][vc_separator style="dashed"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][trx_sc_title title_style="default" title_tag="h2" title_align="center" title="Customization" subtitle="Packages"][vc_empty_space alter_height="medium" hide_on_mobile=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][trx_sc_price prices="%5B%7B%22title%22%3A%22Installation%20%2B%20Logo%20change%22%2C%22subtitle%22%3A%22Regular%22%2C%22price%22%3A%22%2445%22%2C%22details%22%3A%22%3Cul%20style%3D%5C%22text-align%3Aleft%5C%22%3E%5Cn%3Cli%3EThe%20template%20will%20be%20installed%20on%20your%20server%20exactly%20as%20the%20demo%20looks%20like.%20You%20will%20get%20access%20to%20the%20admin%20panel%2C%20so%20you%20can%20manage%20your%20website%3C%2Fli%3E%5Cn%3Cli%3EWe%20will%20replace%20the%20template%E2%80%99s%20logo%20with%20yours%20on%20each%20page%20of%20the%20template.%20The%20logo%20has%20to%20be%20%20in%20good%20quality%20in%20.PSD%2C%20.EPS%2C%20.PNG%2C%20.JPG%20format.%20Logo%20width%20should%20be%20300px%20and%20600px%3C%2Fli%3E%5Cn%3C%2Ful%3E%22%2C%22link%22%3A%22https%3A%2F%2Fthemerex.net%2Fdownloads%2Ftheme-installation%2F%3Futm_source%3Ddemosplus%26utm_medium%3Ddemosplus%26utm_campaign%3Ddemosplus%22%2C%22link_text%22%3A%22Grab%20this%20deal%22%2C%22icon%22%3A%22none%22%7D%2C%7B%22title%22%3A%22Ready-to-use%20Website%22%2C%22subtitle%22%3A%22Silver%22%2C%22price%22%3A%22%24395%22%2C%22details%22%3A%22%3Cul%20%20style%3D%5C%22text-align%3Aleft%5C%22%3E%5Cn%3Cli%3ETheme%20installation%20on%20your%20server%20with%20your%20logo%3C%2Fli%3E%5Cn%3Cli%3EGoogle%20map%20with%20your%20address%20set%3C%2Fli%3E%5Cn%3Cli%3EContent%20and%20images%20replacement%20up%20to%206%20pages%20(without%20layout%20change)%3C%2Fli%3E%5Cn%3Cli%3ERemoving%20elements%20that%20you%20do%20not%20need%20on%20your%20website%3C%2Fli%3E%5Cn%3Cli%3ESocial%20icons%20set%20(without%20changing%20theme%20layout)%3C%2Fli%3E%5Cn%3Cli%3EColor%20scheme%20replacement%3C%2Fli%3E%5Cn%3C%2Ful%3E%5Cn%22%2C%22link%22%3A%22https%3A%2F%2Fthemerex.net%2Fdownloads%2Fready-use-website%2F%3Futm_source%3Ddemosplus%26utm_medium%3Ddemosplus%26utm_campaign%3Ddemosplus%22%2C%22link_text%22%3A%22Grab%20this%20deal%22%2C%22icon%22%3A%22none%22%7D%2C%7B%22title%22%3A%22Full%20Website%20Package%22%2C%22subtitle%22%3A%22Gold%22%2C%22price%22%3A%22%24699%22%2C%22details%22%3A%22%3Cul%20style%3D%5C%22text-align%3Aleft%5C%22%3E%5Cn%3Cli%3EWordPress%20and%20theme%20installation%3C%2Fli%3E%5Cn%3Cli%3ECustomization%20of%20website%20branding%3C%2Fli%3E%5Cn%3Cli%3EColor%20scheme%20replacement%3C%2Fli%3E%5Cn%3Cli%3EContent%20setup%20(adding%206%20pages%2C%206%20posts%2C%20Revolution%20sliders)%3C%2Fli%3E%5Cn%3Cli%3ESEO%20Essentials%3C%2Fli%3E%5Cn%3Cli%3EWebsite%20speed%20optimization%3C%2Fli%3E%5Cn%3C%2Ful%3E%22%2C%22link%22%3A%22https%3A%2F%2Fthemerex.net%2Fdownloads%2Ffull-website-package%2F%3Futm_source%3Ddemosplus%26utm_medium%3Ddemosplus%26utm_campaign%3Ddemosplus%22%2C%22link_text%22%3A%22Grab%20this%20deal%22%2C%22icon%22%3A%22none%22%7D%5D" item.title: 5 Ways Inclusive Classrooms are Different from Self-Contained Classrooms
item.dc:creator: auticure
item.content:encoded:
<!-- wp:pagelayer/pl_post_props {"post_title":"5 Ways Inclusive Classrooms are Different from Self-Contained Classrooms","post_status":"publish","post_date":"2017-06-22 14:09:40","post_author":"1","post_name":"5-ways-inclusive-classrooms-are-different-from-self-contained-classrooms","featured_image":1804,"post_category":["16"],"pagelayer-id":"oib7741"} /--> <!-- wp:pagelayer/pl_row {"pagelayer-id":"9x92813"} --> <!-- wp:pagelayer/pl_col {"pagelayer-id":"tgw2880"} --> <!-- wp:pagelayer/pl_text {"text":"Inclusive classrooms differ from self-contained classrooms in several key ways. In inclusive settings, students with disabilities learn alongside their peers in the same general education classroom, often with support from special educators. This environment encourages social interaction, equal participation, and exposure to the standard curriculum with necessary accommodations. In contrast, self-contained classrooms separate students with special needs into specialized environments where teaching is highly individualized and focused on specific goals, such as life skills or adapted academics. While inclusive classrooms promote community and diversity, self-contained classrooms offer more controlled and tailored instruction based on each student’s needs.

Inclusive classrooms also foster a sense of belonging and help reduce stigma by allowing all students to learn and grow together. They support peer relationships, improve communication skills, and encourage acceptance of differences from an early age. On the other hand, self-contained classrooms, while offering a structured and focused setting, may limit social opportunities and exposure to diverse learning experiences. Each model has its benefits, but inclusive education aims to create an open, supportive environment where every student can thrive within the broader school community.

Another important difference lies in the teaching approach. Inclusive classrooms often use collaborative teaching methods, where general and special education teachers work together to meet the needs of all learners. Lessons are designed to be flexible, using differentiated instruction and assistive tools to support diverse abilities. In self-contained classrooms, teaching is more specialized and individualized, with a focus on specific educational or developmental goals tailored to the smaller group. While inclusive classrooms aim for integration and shared learning experiences, self-contained settings provide more intensive, one-on-one support.","pagelayer-id":"v223348"} -->Inclusive classrooms differ from self-contained classrooms in several key ways. In inclusive settings, students with disabilities learn alongside their peers in the same general education classroom, often with support from special educators. This environment encourages social interaction, equal participation, and exposure to the standard curriculum with necessary accommodations. In contrast, self-contained classrooms separate students with special needs into specialized environments where teaching is highly individualized and focused on specific goals, such as life skills or adapted academics. While inclusive classrooms promote community and diversity, self-contained classrooms offer more controlled and tailored instruction based on each student’s needs.
Inclusive classrooms also foster a sense of belonging and help reduce stigma by allowing all students to learn and grow together. They support peer relationships, improve communication skills, and encourage acceptance of differences from an early age. On the other hand, self-contained classrooms, while offering a structured and focused setting, may limit social opportunities and exposure to diverse learning experiences. Each model has its benefits, but inclusive education aims to create an open, supportive environment where every student can thrive within the broader school community.
Another important difference lies in the teaching approach. Inclusive classrooms often use collaborative teaching methods, where general and special education teachers work together to meet the needs of all learners. Lessons are designed to be flexible, using differentiated instruction and assistive tools to support diverse abilities. In self-contained classrooms, teaching is more specialized and individualized, with a focus on specific educational or developmental goals tailored to the smaller group. While inclusive classrooms aim for integration and shared learning experiences, self-contained settings provide more intensive, one-on-one support.<!-- /wp:pagelayer/pl_text --> <!-- /wp:pagelayer/pl_col --> <!-- /wp:pagelayer/pl_row -->
